subject: 3 x Postdoctoral fellow posts in cell signalling structural              biology
body:
Dear all, 

I would like to highlight three postdoctoral positions in my lab which may be of interest to structural biologist / biochemists (see links below). I will be happy to answer any questions. 

https://www.jobs.ac.uk/job/CIN622/research-fellow-in-cell-signalling-structural-biology-and-cryoem <https://www.jobs.ac.uk/job/CIN622/research-fellow-in-cell-signalling-structural-biology-and-cryoem> 

https://www.jobs.ac.uk/job/CIM071/research-fellow-in-structural-biology-and-cryoem <https://www.jobs.ac.uk/job/CIM071/research-fellow-in-structural-biology-and-cryoem> 

Best wishes, 
Elton

**************************************************
Elton Zeqiraj, PhD
Sir Henry Dale Fellow
Astbury Centre for Structural Molecular Biology
School of Molecular and Cellular Biology
Faculty of Biological Sciences
Astbury Building, Room 8.107
University of Leeds,
Leeds,LS2 9JT, UK

Tel: +44 113 3433079
email: e.zeqiraj@leeds.ac.uk 
web: https://www.zeqirajlab.com
